name: Mistral Small 3
seoTitle: Mistral Small 3 — Mistral AI LLM specs
metaDescription: Mistral Small 3 (Mistral AI), released 2025-01-30 — part of the Mistral Small line. Latency-optimized 24B dense, Apache 2.0 (mistral-small-2501).
overview: Mistral Small 3 is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mistral Small line. Released 2025-01-30. Compact open-weight line for low-latency, locally deployable general use.
What's notable in this version: Latency-optimized 24B dense, Apache 2.0 (mistral-small-2501).
